title: oxymeris alpestris
intro: Oxymeris alpestris, also known as the 'Mountain Oxymeris', is a plant species that belongs to the genus Oxymeris, a group of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oxymeris alpestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Oxymeris alpestris typically include its leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
